title: South African police officer lowered into crocodile-infested river to recover human remains
content: Police suspect the human remains belong to a businessman swept away by floodwater last week.

originalTitle: Nigeria summons South African envoy over attacks on its nationals
title: Nigeria summons South African envoy over attacks on its nationals
content: There has been a wave of anti-migrant protests in South Africa, some of which have turned violent.

originalTitle: Two US service members reported missing in Morocco, officials say
title: Two US service members reported missing in Morocco, officials say
content: A search and rescue operation is underway for the service members, who are believed to have been involved in an accident, according to authorities.

originalTitle: Investigators say Trump assassination suspect shot officer at press gala
title: Investigators say Trump assassination suspect shot officer at press gala
content: Secret Service agent at White House correspondents' dinner was 'definitively' hit by suspect's bullet, prosecutor says.

title: Floods and landslides kill at least 18 in Kenya
content: Ongoing rains are causing floods and landslides in the East African nation.

originalTitle: Man United beat Liverpool 3-2 to secure Champions League qualification
title: Man United beat Liverpool 3-2 to secure Champions League qualification
content: Kobbie Mainoo's late strike earns a thrilling victory after bitter rivals Liverpool had fought back from two goals down.

originalTitle: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
title: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
content: Before reviewing the proposal on Saturday, US President Donald Trump said he could not imagine it "would be acceptable".

originalTitle: The Iran war has strengthened Ukraine in surprising ways. Could a ceasefire with Russia be closer?
title: The Iran war has strengthened Ukraine in surprising ways. Could a ceasefire with Russia be closer?
content: President Zelensky has been visiting the Gulf to demonstrate his country's military nous.

originalTitle: Germany troop cuts send wrong signal to Russia, say two top US Republicans
title: Germany troop cuts send wrong signal to Russia, say two top US Republicans
content: The chairs of the House and Senate armed services committees said withdrawing 5,000 service personnel risked undermining deterrence.

title: Ferguson taken to hospital as precaution before Man Utd v Liverpool
content: Sir Alex Ferguson is taken to hospital after falling unwell at Old Trafford shortly before Manchester United's Premier League match with Liverpool on Sunday.

title: The battle for sixth... and why teams might need to lose on final day
content: As the Premier League's battle for European places hots up, BBC Sport assesses the situation - and some very strange potential quirks in the race.

originalTitle: Relief for Celtic... now does O'Neill want Rangers to win?
title: Relief for Celtic... now does O'Neill want Rangers to win?
content: Celtic interim manager Martin O'Neill recognises there is still "little margin for error" after his side beat 10-man Hibernian to draw level with Hearts at the top of the Scottish Premiership.
